action.reasoning: Observation: Iter 7 (10 epochs) with effective weights (beta=0.9999), label smoothing 0.1, balanced sampler, and mixup gave val bal acc 0.519 but test bal acc 0.4887, many-shot acc collapsed to 0.16. Analysis: Effective weights (beta=0.9999) massively upweighted tail classes, causing model to ignore head classes. Combined with balanced sampler, it biased predictions toward rare classes. Label smoothing may have further harmed learning. The previous best (0.7137, iter 3) likely used simpler class weighting and no label smoothing. Decision: Revert to unweighted CE (no class weights, no label smoothing), keep balanced sampler and mixup (alpha=0.5, prob=0.5), and run 20 epochs to measure recovery. Submit eval to confirm test balanced accuracy returns to >0.65 before scaling to 80 epochs.
